creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
MobileCube is a simple and clean theme that fits perfect with the RoundcubeMail
system. It includes mail, contacts, and calendar that displays it in a simple,
yet elegant way. MobileCube works with RoundCube 0.3.1+ so if you haveRoundCube
set up and installed, download MobileCube today and try it out!  It's free! We
hope you enjoy it!

WWW: http://phireware.com/projects/mobilecube/
